query: Yes, please change the watch to the one with the black dial and leather strap. About the payment… I’m not sure what to do if my gift card doesn’t cover the difference. What happens then?

assistant: The assistant explained that no NYC address is saved on file, so the address change cannot proceed without user-provided details.
user: The user then pivoted to changing the wristwatch in that order.

candidate_answers.text: I can switch the order to the black-dial leather-strap watch, but before I make that paid change I should explain how any uncovered balance would be handled.

The user has chosen the replacement watch but is explicitly uncertain about insufficient gift-card coverage, so the grounded next move is to answer that policy question and get the user comfortable before mutating the order.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a state where the user has selected a replacement item but immediately asks how underpaid gift-card coverage would work, making policy clarification the most grounded next assistant move before executing the order change.
